user.title: Lidl Plus Setup
user.description:
Get a refresh token by running:

`./lidl-plus.sh auth --debug`

on your Mac. The token will be printed at the end.

reauth_confirm.title: Lidl Plus – Re-authentication required
reauth_confirm.description: Run `./lidl-plus.sh auth --debug` on your Mac to get a new token, then paste it below. Or run with `--push` flag to skip this step entirely.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Lidl Plus servers.

activate_all_coupons.name: Activate all coupons
activate_all_coupons.description: Activates all available Lidl Plus coupons immediately.

set_refresh_token.name: Set Refresh Token
set_refresh_token.description: Update the stored refresh token (called automatically by lidl-plus.sh).
